title: Frontend Batch 26 - Admin Upload Failure Sanitization Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced admin Work thumbnail/icon/HLS video upload and Resume PDF upload failure messages so technical backend/storage details are not shown to users while form state and previews remain intact.
behaviorBugsFound: Work thumbnail upload failures could show raw Cloudflare/R2/storage/stack/status details.
Work icon upload failures could show raw S3/bucket/storage/provider/status details.
Existing-work HLS upload failures could show raw Cloudflare/R2/CORS/stack/status details.
Resume PDF binary upload failures could show raw R2/storage/stack/status details.

validation.command: npx skills find react upload failure sanitization testing

validation.notes: Docker CLI was unavailable, backend port 8080 was not running, and Playwright webServer timed out on server-side fetches to 127.0.0.1:8080.

remainingGaps: Blog/Home image upload failure sanitization remains separate from this Work/Resume-focused batch.
Video remove/reorder failure sanitization remains outside the upload binary failure path.
Full e2e needs Docker Desktop WSL integration or an already running backend on 127.0.0.1:8080.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 27 - Admin Image Upload Failure Sanitization Expansion.
